series_metadata.series_description: Labor contract negotiation records between management and the union (1199 andOCSEA) which began with the first union contract in 1986. Files include notes and correspondence on contractlanguage, changes in the law and reference materials relating to precedent setting disputes and grievances.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office no longer ofadministrative value ; Electronic: in office no longer ofadministrative value
